flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Baptist Health Sciences University fell 52% between 2021 and 2024 (46.6% → 22.4%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Baptist Health Sciences University fell 34% between 2021 and 2024 (60.3% → 39.8%).

flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 26% at Baptist Health Sciences University vs the 2018–2022 baseline (673 vs 904).
